lines.text: Fleurdelys, wilt thou return to me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Is that so? Then I shall reveal the truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Why dost thou resonate with me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Why dost thou hear into the minds of the faithful?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Why dost thou act as my Oracle?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: All this, and yet thou does not question?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I made thee. Thy life, thy hopes, thy will, thy past.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: All that thou are, I made "whole," I made "perfect."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I fed upon the trust, adoration, and longing heaped upon thee by the masses.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thy resonance brought forth the second Dark Tide.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
